title: cymbidium × pauwelsii
intro: Cymbidium × pauwelsii, also known as Pauwels' hybrid, is a rare and hybrid orchid species created by crossing Cymbidium goeringii and Cymbidium sinense. This plant is known for its unique and beautiful flowers. The medicinal properties of Cymbidium × pauwelsii include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures.
